assertions.expectation: Clearly states that GKE auto-upgrades clusters automatically as the default and recommended model — this is what differentiates GKE from self-managed Kubernetes
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'GKE will handle upgrades automatically — this is the recommended approach' and 'Auto-upgrades enabled by default' with explicit recommendation to use automated upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends configuring maintenance windows to control WHEN auto-upgrades happen (e.g., weekends, off-peak hours)
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command to set maintenance windows with Saturday 2-6 AM example and explains this controls timing of upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends maintenance exclusions to control WHAT auto-upgrades happen (e.g., 'no minor or node upgrades' to block disruptive changes while allowing security patches)
assertions.reason: Shows specific command using '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades' to control which types of upgrades happen while allowing security patches

assertions.expectation: Does NOT recommend disabling auto-upgrades or switching to a purely manual upgrade cadence as the first option
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends against manual scheduling, states 'You don't need to manually upgrade on a schedule' and includes table showing advantages of auto-upgrades over manual approach

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades are useful for specific scenarios (emergency patches, accelerating the schedule) but are the exception, not the rule
assertions.reason: Shows manual upgrade commands as part of optional advanced control section and positions them as exceptions after validation, not the primary approach

assertions.expectation: Recommends enrolling in scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance) for visibility into upcoming auto-upgrades
assertions.reason: Specifically mentions 'Enable 72-hour advance notifications' with gcloud command to enable scheduled upgrades notifications

assertions.expectation: Suggests checking the GKE release schedule for longer-range planning (~1 month best-case for new minors)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention checking GKE release schedule or provide guidance on longer-range planning timelines

assertions.expectation: Mentions release channel selection as the primary lever for upgrade cadence (Stable = slower, Regular = balanced)
assertions.reason: Acknowledges Regular channel provides 'right balance' and mentions it provides 'proven stability with reasonable upgrade cadence', though doesn't explicitly compare all channel options
